case_title: VAN ACKER, PETER J.G. VS KWACK, MYUNG DBA WEST PORTAL CLEANING SERVICE

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY VAN ACKER, PETER J.G. AS TO DEFENDANT KWACK, MYUNG DBA WEST PORTAL CLEANING SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-09-1992, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO DEC-23-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
